steps.title: Identify what the evidence should show
steps.content: The researchers concluded nitrogen fertilizer increases yield. Supporting evidence must demonstrate that nitrogen outperformed the control condition.

steps.title: Check which choice shows this pattern
steps.content: Choice B states that in every year, nitrogen yield exceeded control yield. The graph confirms this: 2017 (34 > 23), 2018 (41 > 31), 2019 (27 > 19). This consistent pattern directly supports the researchers' conclusion about nitrogen's effectiveness. Choice A fails at 2019 (27 < 30), while choices C and D describe isolated observations unrelated to the core comparison. That matches choice B — B is correct.
